line: - Recall-time prefetch hint submission now follows predicted hot-path guidance instead of the old unconditional fallback in `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs:4628`.
- It only queues when predicted `prewarm_action != "observe_only"` and maps the predicted trigger to bounded `PrefetchTrigger` values.

- I also fixed the local daemon-side `normalize_recall_contract(...)` compile drift from the new `mood_congruent` arg in `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs:3152`, `3222`, `4091`, and unit-test call sites around `6889`.
- I kept `runtime_doctor_parity` aligned with actual doctor/health behavior; that path still reports `hints_submitted=0` for the exercised scenario.
- Additional daemon unit-test runs are currently blocked by unrelated pre-existing drift in `crates/membrain-core/src/brain_store.rs:357` (`BrainStore` initializer missing `compression`).
GROVE_RESULT: bounded F13 prefetch-hint wiring landed in daemon recall path; prewarm remains advisory.
